    Index

    A D E F G H I L M R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addAnime(Anime, int) - Method in class Library
    Adds an Anime to the library.
    addMusicAlbum(MusicAlbum, int) - Method in class Library
    Adds a MusicAlbum to the library.
    addMusicSingle(MusicSingle, int) - Method in class Library
    Adds a MusicSingle to the library.
    addNewMedia() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Tells the user to pick a media type and collects details to add a new entry.
    addPlaytime(int) - Method in class VideoGame
    Adds hours to the total playtime.
    addTVSeries(TVSeries, int) - Method in class Library
    Adds a TVSeries to the library.
    addVideoGame(VideoGame, int) - Method in class Library
    Adds a VideoGame to the library.
    Anime - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents an anime entry in the user's media list.
    Anime(String, String, String, String, int, boolean) - Constructor for class Anime
    Creates an anime with its details and generates episode objects.

    D

    displayAllEntries() - Method in class Library
    Displays all entries across every media type.
    displayEntries() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Displays library entries with optional filtering by status or type.
    displayEpisodes() - Method in class Anime
    Prints all episodes and their details.
    displayEpisodes() - Method in class TVSeries
    Prints all episodes and their details.
    displayInfo() - Method in class Anime
    Returns a formatted string of all anime details.
    displayInfo() - Method in class Episode
    Returns a formatted string containing all details of the episode.
    displayInfo() - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Formats and returns a string containing details of the album
    displayInfo() - Method in class MusicSingle
    Formats and returns a string including the MusicSingle's details.
    displayInfo() - Method in class Track
    Returns a formatted string of the track's details.
    displayInfo() - Method in class TVSeries
    Returns a formatted string of all TV series details.
    displayInfo() - Method in class VideoGame
    Returns a formatted string of the video game's details.
    displaySummary() - Method in class Library
    Prints a summary of library stats including counts and average rating.
    displayTracks() - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Prints all tracks and their details.

    E

    Episode - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a single episode of an anime or TV series.
    Episode(int) - Constructor for class Episode
    Initializes the episode with its episode number.

    F

    favoriteEpisode(int) - Method in class Anime
    Toggles the favorite status of a specific episode.
    favoriteEpisode(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Toggles the favorite status of a specific episode.
    favoriteTrack(int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Toggles the favorite status of a specific track.
    filterByStatus(int) - Method in class Library
    Displays only entries that match the given status.
    filterByType(String) - Method in class Library
    Displays only entries of the given media type.
    findEpisode(int) - Method in class Anime
    Finds and returns an episode by its number, or null if not found.
    findEpisode(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Finds and returns an episode by its number, or null if not found.
    findTrack(int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Finds and returns a track by its number, or null if not found.

    G

    getAnimeByTitle(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for an Anime by its title.
    getAnimes() - Method in class Library
    Retrieves the list of animes in the library.

    getEpisodeNumber() - Method in class Episode
     
    getLibrary() - Method in class User
     
    getMusicAlbumByTitle(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for a MusicAlbum by its title.
    getMusicAlbums() - Method in class Library
    Retrieves the list of music albums in the library.
    getMusicSingleByTitle(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for a MusicSingle by its title.
    getMusicSingles() - Method in class Library
    Retrieves the list of music singles in the library.

    Converts a status integer to its string label.

    getTitle() - Method in class MusicAlbum
     
    getTitle() - Method in class MusicSingle
     
    getTitle() - Method in class TVSeries
     
    getTitle() - Method in class VideoGame
     
    getTrackNumber() - Method in class Track
     
    getTVSeries() - Method in class Library
    Retrieves the list of TV series in the library.
    getTVSeriesByTitle(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for a TVSeries by its title.
    getUsername() - Method in class User
     
    getVideoGameByTitle(String) - Method in class Library
    Searches for a VideoGame by its title.
    getVideoGames() - Method in class Library

    H

    hasListenedTo() - Method in class Track
     

    I

    isFavorite() - Method in class Episode
     
    isFavorite() - Method in class Track
     
    isWatched() - Method in class Episode
     

    L

    Library - Class in Unnamed Package
    Stores and manages all media entries in the user's library.
    Library() - Constructor for class Library
     
    login(String, String) - Method in class User
    Logs in the user given the password and the username.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class MainDriver
    The main function of the program, enables all the classes/objects in the program
    MainDriver - Class in Unnamed Package
    Handles all user interaction and drives the media vault program.
    MainDriver() - Constructor for class MainDriver
     
    manageEpisodesOrTracks() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Lets the user manage individual episodes or tracks within a media entry.
    markEpisodeWatched(int) - Method in class Anime
    Marks a specific episode as watched.
    markEpisodeWatched(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Marks a specific episode as watched.
    markListened() - Method in class Track
    Marks this track as listened to.
    markWatched() - Method in class Episode
    Marks the episode as watched.
    MusicAlbum - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a music album entry in the user's media list.
    MusicAlbum(String, int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class MusicAlbum
    Creates an album with its details and generates track objects.
    MusicSingle - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a music single entry in the user's library.
    MusicSingle(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class MusicSingle
    Creates a new music single with default status of 0 (planned).

    R

    rate(int) - Method in class Anime
    Rates the anime from 1 to 10, only if completed.
    rate(int) - Method in class Episode
    Rates the episode from 1-10, only if watched.
    rate(int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Rates the album from 1 to 10, only if completed.
    rate(int) - Method in class MusicSingle
    Rates the music single from 1-10.
    rate(int) - Method in class Track
    Rates the track from 1-10.
    rate(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Rates the TV series from 1 to 10, only if completed.
    rate(int) - Method in class VideoGame
    Rates the video game from 1-10.
    rateEpisode(int, int) - Method in class Anime
    Rates a specific episode by its number.
    rateEpisode(int, int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Rates a specific episode by its number.
    rateReviewMedia() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Lets the user rate and/or review a completed media entry.
    rateTrack(int, int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Rates a specific track by its number.
    readInitialStatus() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Prompts the user to enter an initial status and reads the input.
    readNewStatus() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Prompts the user to enter a new status and reads the input.
    readRateReviewChoice() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Prompts the user to enter a rate or review choice and reads the input.
    readString() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Reads a string from the user input.
    readValidInt() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Reads a valid integer from the user input.
    readYesOrNo() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Reads a yes or no answer from the user input.
    register(String, String, String) - Method in class User
    Registers the user with the given credentials.
    removeAnime(Anime) - Method in class Library
    Removes an Anime from the library.
    removeMusicAlbum(MusicAlbum) - Method in class Library
    Removes a MusicAlbum from the library.
    removeMusicSingle(MusicSingle) - Method in class Library
    Removes a MusicSingle from the library.
    removeTVSeries(TVSeries) - Method in class Library
    Removes a TVSeries from the library.
    removeVideoGame(VideoGame) - Method in class Library
    Removes a VideoGame from the library.
    review(String) - Method in class Anime
    Adds a text review for the anime, only if completed.
    review(String) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Adds a text review for the album, only if completed and left unblanked.
    review(String) - Method in class MusicSingle
    Adds a text review if the song is completed.
    review(String) - Method in class TVSeries
    Adds a text review for the TV series, only if completed.
    review(String) - Method in class VideoGame
    Adds a text review if the game is completed.

    S

    StatusMapper - Class in Unnamed Package
    Maps integer status codes to readable status strings.
    StatusMapper() - Constructor for class StatusMapper
     

    T

    toggleFavorite() - Method in class Episode
    Toggles the favorite status of the episode.
    toggleFavorite() - Method in class Track
    Toggles the favorite status of the track.
    Track - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a single track in a music album.
    Track(int) - Constructor for class Track
    creates a new unlistened, unrated track
    TVSeries - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a TV series entry in the user's media list.
    TVSeries(String, String, String, int, boolean) - Constructor for class TVSeries
    Creates a TV series with its details and generates episode objects.

    U

    updateEntryStatus() - Static method in class MainDriver
    Lets the user pick a media entry by type and title, then update its status.
    updateProgress(int) - Method in class Anime
    Marks all episodes up to the given episode number as watched.
    updateProgress(int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Marks all tracks up to the given track number as listened.
    updateProgress(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Marks all episodes up to the given episode number as watched.
    updateStatus(int) - Method in class Anime
    Updates the watching status of the anime.
    updateStatus(int) - Method in class MusicAlbum
    Updates the listening status of the album.
    updateStatus(int) - Method in class MusicSingle
    Updates the status if the new value is within valid range.
    updateStatus(int) - Method in class TVSeries
    Updates the watching status of the TV series.
    updateStatus(int) - Method in class VideoGame
    Updates the status if the new value is within valid range.
    updateStatus(String, String, int) - Method in class Library
    Finds a media entry by type and title, then updates its status.
    User - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a user account with login credentials and a media library.
    User() - Constructor for class User
    Creates a new user with an empty library.

    V

    VideoGame - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a video game entry in the user's library.
    VideoGame(String, String, int, String, String) - Constructor for class VideoGame
    Creates a new video game with default status of 0 (planned).
